top_weaknesses.issue: Voice drifts into VC-thesis abstraction ('current application layer', 'economic value', 'defensibility', 'ambient context, suggested action, and accountable execution'); blunts shareability for HN/operators
top_weaknesses.fix: Replace abstract bridge phrases with concrete operator nouns; cut the keynote-style closer in favor of one sharp sentence

top_weaknesses.issue: Paragraph 2 (the 'It is no longer enough...' a16z block) is dense and citation-heavy at ~80 words — feels like a wall on mobile before the post has earned trust
top_weaknesses.fix: Split into two paragraphs and push the a16z citation later or to a single short clause

top_weaknesses.issue: Headlines are clever-magazine ('The Blank Box Shrinks') but underuse search-relevant terms (AI agents, enterprise AI, agentic workflows)
top_weaknesses.fix: Tighten one or two H2s to name the claim directly, e.g. 'Chat Was the Training-Wheel Interface'

top_weaknesses.issue: Lots of 'It is therefore...' / 'This is also why...' connective tissue that reads as essay-AI rhythm
top_weaknesses.fix: Cut connective adverbs; let claims stand without scaffolding

consensus_summary: Strong, coherent thesis with a story-shaped H2 outline that all personas can follow. Holds back from being shared because the prose drifts into abstract VC-thesis voice and one early paragraph is wall-shaped on mobile.
